slides.title: Time in nature is a *real longevity habit*.
slides.sub: Green space is linked to lower stress and a calmer body. About two hours a week seems to be the dose.

slides.title: Green time, less stress
slides.body: Time in green space is *linked to lower stress*, lower blood pressure and better mood. The effect is gentle but real.

slides.title: Two hours a week
slides.body: Research points to *about two hours a week* in nature as a helpful target. It can be split across several short visits.

slides.title: Three things at once
slides.body: Nature blends *movement, daylight and calm*. Each supports healthy aging, and you get all three together.

slides.title: A park counts
slides.body: You do not need wilderness. *A city park counts*, and it is usually a short walk from home.

slides.title: Make it a ritual
slides.body: Turn it into a *weekly ritual* you look forward to. Habits that feel good are the ones that actually last.

slides.title: Build the calm habits that *add years*.
slides.body: Vibe Health scores the movement, daylight and recovery that support healthy aging, turning your whole day into one simple number.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Time in nature is a real longevity habit. Green space is linked to lower stress, lower blood pressure and a better mood. 🌳

About two hours a week seems to be a helpful dose, and a city park counts. It blends gentle movement, daylight and calm in one. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the habits that support healthy aging into one daily score → link in bio.
